12: from agentcube.exceptions import AgentCubeError, CommandExecutionError
13: 
14: 
15: class CodeInterpreterClient:
16:     """Client for Code Interpreter sessions."""
17:     
18:     SESSION_HEADER = "x-agentcube-session-id"
19:     
20:     def __init__(
21:         self,
22:         router_url: Optional[str] = None,
23:         workload_manager_url: Optional[str] = None,
24:         session_id: Optional[str] = None,
25:         name: str = "code-interpreter",
26:         namespace: str = "default",
27:         timeout: float = 120.0,
28:         connect_timeout: float = 5.0,
29:         auth_token: Optional[str] = None,
30:     ):
31:         self.router_url = router_url or os.environ.get("ROUTER_URL")
32:         if not self.router_url:
33:             raise ValueError("Router URL must be provided via argument or ROUTER_URL environment variable")
34:         
35:         self.workload_manager_url = workload_manager_url or os.environ.get("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL")
36:         self.session_id = session_id
37:         self.name = name
38:         self.namespace = namespace
39:         self.timeout = timeout
40:         self.connect_timeout = connect_timeout
41:         self.auth_token = auth_token
42:         
43:         self._control_plane_session: Optional[requests.Session] = None
44:         self._data_plane_session: Optional[requests.Session] = None
45:         self._created_session = False
46:         
47:         self._init_sessions()
48:         
49:         if not self.session_id:
50:             self._create_session()
51:             self._created_session = True
52:         
53:         self._init_data_plane()
54:     
55:     def _init_sessions(self):
56:         self._control_plane_session = requests.Session()
57:         self._data_plane_session = requests.Session()
58:         
59:         adapter = HTTPAdapter(
60:             max_retries=Retry(total=3, backoff_factor=0.5)
61:         )
62:         self._control_plane_session.mount("http://", adapter)
63:         self._control_plane_session.mount("https://", adapter)
64:         self._data_plane_session.mount("http://", adapter)
65:         self._data_plane_session.mount("https://", adapter)
66:         
67:         token = self.auth_token
68:         if not token:
69:             token = self._read_token_from_file()
70:         if token:
71:             self._control_plane_session.headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {token}"
72:     
73:     def _read_token_from_file(self) -> Optional[str]:
74:         token_path = "/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token"
75:         if os.path.exists(token_path):
76:             with open(token_path, "r") as f:
77:                 return f.read().strip()
78:         return None
79:     
80:     def _create_session(self):
81:         if not self.workload_manager_url:
82:             raise ValueError("WORKLOAD_MANAGER_URL required to create session")
83:         
84:         url = f"{self.workload_manager_url}/v1/code-interpreter"
85:         resp = self._control_plane_session.post(
86:             url,
87:             json={"name": self.name, "namespace": self.namespace},
88:             timeout=(self.connect_timeout, self.timeout),
89:         )
90:         resp.raise_for_status()
91:         data = resp.json()
92:         self.session_id = data.get("sessionId")
93:         if not self.session_id:
94:             raise ValueError("sessionId not in response")
95:     
96:     def _init_data_plane(self):
97:         base_url = urljoin(
98:             self.router_url,
99:             f"/v1/namespaces/{self.namespace}/code-interpreters/{self.name}/invocations/"
100:         )
101:         self._data_plane_session.headers[self.SESSION_HEADER] = self.session_id
102:         self._base_url = base_url
103:     
104:     def _request(
105:         self,
106:         method: str,
107:         path: str,
108:         **kwargs
109:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
110:         url = urljoin(self._base_url, path)
111:         timeout = kwargs.pop("timeout", (self.connect_timeout, self.timeout))
112:         resp = self._data_plane_session.request(
113:             method,
114:             url,
115:             timeout=timeout,
116:             **kwargs
117:         )
118:         resp.raise_for_status()
119:         return resp.json()
120:     
121:     def execute_command(
122:         self,
123:         command: List[str],
124:         timeout: Optional[float] = None,
125:         working_dir: Optional[str] = None,
126:         env: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
127:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
128:         if timeout is None:
129:             timeout = self.timeout
130:         
131:         body = {
132:             "command": command,
133:             "timeout": f"{int(timeout)}s",
134:         }
135:         if working_dir:
136:             body["working_dir"] = working_dir
137:         if env:
138:             body["env"] = env
139:         
140:         result = self._request(
141:             "POST",
142:             "api/execute",
143:             json=body,
144:             timeout=(self.connect_timeout, timeout + 2.0),
145:         )
146:         
147:         if result.get("exit_code", 0) != 0:
148:             raise CommandExecutionError(
149:                 exit_code=result["exit_code"],
150:                 stderr=result.get("stderr", ""),
151:                 command=command,
152:             )
153:         
154:         return result
155:     
156:     def run_code(
157:         self,
158:         code: str,
159:         language: str = "python",
160:         timeout: Optional[float] = None,
161:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
162:         if language in ("python", "py", "python3"):
163:             timestamp = int(time.time() * 1000)
164:             filename = f"code_{timestamp}.py"
165:             self.write_file(filename, code)
166:             return self.execute_command(["python3", filename], timeout=timeout)
167:         else:
168:             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported language: {language}")
169:     
170:     def write_file(
171:         self,
172:         path: str,
173:         content: str,
174:         mode: str = "0644",
175:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
176:         encoded = base64.b64encode(content.encode()).decode()
177:         return self._request(
178:             "POST",
179:             "api/files",
180:             json={"path": path, "content": encoded, "mode": mode},
181:         )
182:     
183:     def upload_file(
184:         self,
185:         path: str,
186:         file_path: str,
187:         mode: str = "0644",
188:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
189:         with open(file_path, "rb") as f:
190:             files = {"file": f}
191:             data = {"path": path, "mode": mode}
192:             headers = {self.SESSION_HEADER: self.session_id}
193:             url = urljoin(self._base_url, "api/files")
194:             resp = self._data_plane_session.post(
195:                 url,
196:                 files=files,
197:                 data=data,
198:                 headers=headers,
199:                 timeout=(self.connect_timeout, self.timeout),
200:             )
201:             resp.raise_for_status()
202:             return resp.json()
203:     
204:     def download_file(self, path: str) -> bytes:
205:         url = urljoin(self._base_url, f"api/files/{path}")
206:         resp = self._data_plane_session.get(
207:             url,
208:             timeout=(self.connect_timeout, self.timeout),
209:         )
210:         resp.raise_for_status()
211:         return resp.content
212:     
213:     def list_files(self, path: str = "/") -> Dict[str, Any]:
214:         return self._request("GET", f"api/files?path={path}")
215:     
216:     def stop(self):
217:         if self._control_plane_session:
218:             self._control_plane_session.close()
219:         if self._data_plane_session:
220:             self._data_plane_session.close()
221:         
222:         if self._created_session and self.session_id and self.workload_manager_url:
223:             try:
224:                 url = f"{self.workload_manager_url}/v1/code-interpreter/sessions/{self.session_id}"
225:                 self._control_plane_session.delete(url)
226:             except Exception:
227:                 pass
228:     
229:     def __enter__(self):
230:         return self
231:     
232:     def __exit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb):
233:         self.stop()
234:         return False
235: 
236: 
237: class AgentRuntimeClient:
238:     """Client for Agent Runtime sessions."""
239:     
240:     SESSION_HEADER = "x-agentcube-session-id"
241:     
242:     def __init__(
243:         self,
244:         router_url: str,
245:         agent_name: str,
246:         namespace: str = "default",
247:         session_id: Optional[str] = None,
248:         timeout: float = 120.0,
249:         connect_timeout: float = 5.0,
250:     ):
251:         self.router_url = router_url
252:         self.agent_name = agent_name
253:         self.namespace = namespace
254:         self.timeout = timeout
255:         self.connect_timeout = connect_timeout
256:         
257:         self._session = requests.Session()
258:         adapter = HTTPAdapter(max_retries=Retry(total=3, backoff_factor=0.5))
259:         self._session.mount("http://", adapter)
260:         self._session.mount("https://", adapter)
261:         
262:         self._base_url = urljoin(
263:             router_url,
264:             f"/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/agent-runtimes/{agent_name}/invocations/"
265:         )
266:         
267:         if not session_id:
268:             session_id = self._bootstrap_session()
269:         self.session_id = session_id
270:         self._session.headers[self.SESSION_HEADER] = self.session_id
271:         self._session.headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
272:     
273:     def _bootstrap_session(self) -> str:
274:         resp = self._session.get(self._base_url, timeout=(self.connect_timeout, self.timeout))
275:         resp.raise_for_status()
276:         session_id = resp.headers.get(self.SESSION_HEADER)
277:         if not session_id:
278:             raise ValueError(f"Missing required response header: {self.SESSION_HEADER}")
279:         return session_id
280:     
281:     def invoke(
282:         self,
283:         payload: Dict[str, Any],
284:         timeout: Optional[float] = None,
285:     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
286:         if not self.session_id:
287:             raise ValueError("AgentRuntime session_id is not initialized")
288:         
289:         if timeout is None:
290:             timeout = self.timeout
291:         
292:         resp = self._session.post(
293:             self._base_url,
294:             json=payload,
295:             timeout=(self.connect_timeout, timeout),
296:         )
297:         resp.raise_for_status()
298:         return resp.json()
299:     
300:     def close(self):
301:         if self._session:
302:             self._session.close()
303:     
304:     def __enter__(self):
305:         return self
306:     
307:     def __exit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb):
308:         self.close()
309:         return False

30:      ↔ Redis/Valkey (session store)
31:      → WorkloadManager (Service :8080)

34:   Sandbox Pods (with optional PicoD daemon)
35:   Agentd (idle cleanup controller)
36:   Optional: Volcano vc-agent-scheduler
37: ```
38: 
39: ## Conventions
40: 
41: - Go packages under `pkg/`, binaries under `cmd/`
42: - Python CLI at `cmd/cli/`, SDK at `sdk-python/`
43: - JSON tags use camelCase; Go structs use PascalCase
44: - K8s resources use `runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh` API group
45: - Normative language: SHALL = mandatory, SHOULD = recommended, MAY = optional

# AgentCube — OpenSpec Project Context

> Source: [github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube](https://github.com/ShijunDeng/agentcube)
> Generated: 2026-03-21 (from source tree reverse-engineering)

## Purpose

AgentCube is a Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform for AI agents.
It provisions isolated sandbox pods on demand, routes HTTP traffic to them through
session-aware proxies, and manages their lifecycle (creation, expiry, idle cleanup).

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Language (server) | Go 1.24, module `github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube` |
| Language (CLI/SDK) | Python ≥3.10 |
| HTTP framework | Gin (Go), Typer (Python CLI), FastAPI (example) |
| Kubernetes | CRDs (`runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1`), controller-runtime, `sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox` |
| Storage | Redis (go-redis/v9), Valkey (valkey-go) |

56: 	h2s := &http2.Server{}

58: 	httpServer := &http.Server{
59: 		Addr:    addr,
60: 		Handler: h2c.NewHandler(server, h2s),
61: 	}
62: 
63: 	fmt.Printf("Starting workload manager on %s\n", addr)
64: 	if *enableTLS {
65: 		if *tlsCert == "" || *tlsKey == "" {
66: 			fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "TLS enabled but cert/key not provided")
67: 			os.Exit(1)
68: 		}
69: 		if err := httpServer.ListenAndServeTLS(*tlsCert, *tlsKey); err != nil && err != http.ErrServerClosed {
70: 			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Server error: %v\n", err)
71: 			os.Exit(1)
72: 		}
73: 	} else {
74: 		if err := httpServer.ListenAndServe(); err != nil && err != http.ErrServerClosed {
75: 			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Server error: %v\n", err)
76: 			os.Exit(1)
77: 		}
78: 	}
79: }

<content>1: package workloadmanager
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"errors"
6: 	"net/http"
7: 	"strings"
8: 	"time"
9: 
10: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
11: 	authenticationv1 "k8s.io/api/authentication/v1"
12: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
13: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
14: )
15: 
16: type TokenCache struct {
17: 	entries map[string]*tokenEntry
18: 	maxSize int
19: 	ttl     time.Duration
20: }
21: 
22: type tokenEntry struct {
23: 	username           string
24: 	serviceAccountName string
25: 	namespace          string
26: 	lastAccess         time.Time
27: }
28: 
29: func NewTokenCache(maxSize int, ttl time.Duration) *TokenCache {
30: 	return &TokenCache{
31: 		entries: make(map[string]*tokenEntry),
32: 		maxSize: maxSize,
33: 		ttl:     ttl,
34: 	}
35: }
36: 
37: func (tc *TokenCache) Get(token string) (*tokenEntry, bool) {
38: 	entry, ok := tc.entries[token]
39: 	if !ok {
40: 		return nil, false
41: 	}
42: 	if time.Since(entry.lastAccess) > tc.ttl {
43: 		delete(tc.entries, token)
44: 		return nil, false
45: 	}
46: 	entry.lastAccess = time.Now()
47: 	return entry, true
48: }
49: 
50: func (tc *TokenCache) Set(token string, username, saName, namespace string) {
51: 	if len(tc.entries) >= tc.maxSize {
52: 		for k, v := range tc.entries {
53: 			if time.Since(v.lastAccess) > tc.ttl {
54: 				delete(tc.entries, k)
55: 			}
56: 		}
57: 	}
58: 	tc.entries[token] = &tokenEntry{
59: 		username:           username,
60: 		serviceAccountName: saName,
61: 		namespace:          namespace,
62: 		lastAccess:         time.Now(),
63: 	}
64: }
65: 
66: func (s *Server) authMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
67: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
68: 		authHeader := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
69: 		if authHeader == "" {
70: 			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Missing authorization header"})
71: 			c.Abort()
72: 			return
73: 		}
74: 
75: 		parts := strings.SplitN(authHeader, " ", 2)
76: 		if len(parts) != 2 || parts[0] != "Bearer" {
77: 			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid authorization header format"})
78: 			c.Abort()
79: 			return
80: 		}
81: 
82: 		token := parts[1]
83: 		entry, ok := s.tokenCache.Get(token)
84: 		if ok {
85: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyUserToken), token)
86: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyServiceAccount), entry.username)
87: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyServiceAccountName), entry.serviceAccountName)
88: 			c.Set(string(contextKeyNamespace), entry.namespace)
89: 			c.Next()
90: 			return
91: 		}
92: 
93: 		username, saName, namespace, err := s.validateServiceAccountToken(c.Request.Context(), token)
94: 		if err != nil {
95: 			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, ErrorResponse{Message: "Invalid token"})
96: 			c.Abort()
97: 			return
98: 		}
99: 
100: 		s.tokenCache.Set(token, username, saName, namespace)
101: 		c.Set(string(contextKeyUserToken), token)
102: 		c.Set(string(contextKeyServiceAccount), username)
103: 		c.Set(string(contextKeyServiceAccountName), saName)
104: 		c.Set(string(contextKeyNamespace), namespace)
105: 		c.Next()
106: 	}
107: }
108: 
109: func (s *Server) validateServiceAccountToken(ctx context.Context, token string) (username, saName, namespace string, err error) {
110: 	if s.k8sClient == nil || s.k8sClient.clientset == nil {
111: 		return "", "", "", errors.New("kubernetes client not initialized")
112: 	}
113: 
114: 	tr := &authenticationv1.TokenReview{
115: 		Spec: authenticationv1.TokenReviewSpec{
116: 			Token: token,
117: 		},
118: 	}
119: 
120: 	result, err := s.k8sClient.clientset.AuthenticationV1().TokenReviews().Create(ctx, tr, metav1.CreateOptions{})
121: 	if err != nil {
122: 		return "", "", "", err
123: 	}
124: 
125: 	if !result.Status.Authenticated {
126: 		return "", "", "", errors.New("token not authenticated")
127: 	}
128: 
129: 	username = result.Status.User.Username
130: 	if strings.HasPrefix(username, "system:serviceaccount:") {
131: 		parts := strings.Split(username, ":")
132: 		if len(parts) >= 4 {
133: 			namespace = parts[2]
134: 			saName = parts[3]
135: 		}
136: 	}
137: 
138: 	return username, saName, namespace, nil
139: }
140: 
141: type K8sClient struct {
142: 	clientset       *kubernetes.Clientset
143: 	dynamicClient   dynamic.Interface
144: 	scheme          *runtime.Scheme
145: 	baseConfig      *rest.Config
146: 	clientCache     *ClientCache
147: 	dynamicInformer dynamicinformer.DynamicSharedInformerFactory
148: 	informerFactory informers.SharedInformerFactory
149: 	podInformer     cache.SharedIndexInformer
150: 	podLister       listersv1.PodLister
151: }
152: 
153: type ClientCache struct {
154: 	clients map[string]dynamic.Interface
155: 	mu      sync.RWMutex
156: }
157: 
158: func NewClientCache() *ClientCache {
159: 	return &ClientCache{
160: 		clients: make(map[string]dynamic.Interface),
161: 	}
162: }
163: 
164: func (cc *ClientCache) GetOrCreate(namespace, saName string, config *rest.Config) (dynamic.Interface, error) {
165: 	key := namespace + ":" + saName
166: 	cc.mu.RLock()
167: 	if client, ok := cc.clients[key]; ok {
168: 		cc.mu.RUnlock()
169: 		return client, nil
170: 	}
171: 	cc.mu.RUnlock()
172: 
173: 	cc.mu.Lock()
174: 	defer cc.mu.Unlock()
175: 	if client, ok := cc.clients[key]; ok {
176: 		return client, nil
177: 	}
178: 
179: 	client, err := dynamic.NewForConfig(config)
180: 	if err != nil {
181: 		return nil, err
182: 	}
183: 	cc.clients[key] = client
184: 	return client, nil
185: }

(End of file - total 185 lines)
</content>

42: 		provider = s

45: 		if err != nil {

47: 		}
48: 		provider = s
49: 	default:

51: 	}

package main

import (
	"context"
	"flag"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/router"
)

func main() {
	port := flag.String("port", "8080", "HTTP port")
	workloadManagerURL := flag.String("workload-manager-url", "", "Workload manager URL")
	maxConcurrent := flag.Int("max-concurrent", 1000, "Maximum concurrent requests")
	enableTLS := flag.Bool("enable-tls", false, "Enable TLS")
	tlsCert := flag.String("tls-cert", "", "TLS certificate path")
	tlsKey := flag.String("tls-key", "", "TLS key path")
	debug := flag.Bool("debug", false, "Enable debug logging")
	flag.Parse()

	cfg := &router.Config{
		Port:                  *port,
		WorkloadManagerURL:    *workloadManagerURL,
		MaxConcurrentRequests: *maxConcurrent,
		EnableTLS:             *enableTLS,
		TLSCert:               *tlsCert,
		TLSKey:                *tlsKey,
	}

	server, err := router.NewServer(cfg)
	if err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Failed to create server: %v\n", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()

	sigCh := make(chan os.Signal, 1)
	signal.Notify(sigCh, syscall.SIGINT, syscall.SIGTERM)

	go func() {
		<-sigCh
		fmt.Println("Shutting down...")
		if err := server.Shutdown(ctx); err != nil {
			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Shutdown error: %v\n", err)
		}
		cancel()
	}()

	fmt.Printf("Starting router on :%s\n", *port)
	if *debug {
		fmt.Println("Debug mode enabled")
	}
	if err := server.Start(ctx); err != nil && err != http.ErrServerClosed {
		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Server error: %v\n", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}
}

<content>1: package api

3: import (

6: 
7: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
8: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema"
9: )
10: 
11: const (
12: 	resourceGroup               = "agentcube.volcano.sh"
13: 	sessionResourceName         = "sessions"
14: 	agentRuntimeResourceName    = "agentruntimes"
15: 	codeInterpreterResourceName = "codeinterpreters"
16: )
17: 
18: var (
19: 	ErrAgentRuntimeNotFound    = errors.New("agent runtime not found")
20: 	ErrCodeInterpreterNotFound = errors.New("code interpreter not found")
21: 	ErrTemplateMissing         = errors.New("resource has no pod template")
22: 	ErrPublicKeyMissing        = errors.New("public key not yet loaded from Router Secret")
23: )
24: 
25: func NewSessionNotFoundError(sessionID string) error {
26: 	return &metav1.StatusError{
27: 		ErrStatus: metav1.Status{
28: 			Status:  metav1.StatusFailure,
29: 			Code:    404,
30: 			Reason:  metav1.StatusReasonNotFound,
31: 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("Session %q not found", sessionID),
32: 			Details: &metav1.StatusDetails{
33: 				Group: resourceGroup,
34: 				Kind:  sessionResourceName,
35: 				Name:  sessionID,
36: 			},
37: 		},
38: 	}
39: }
40: 
41: func NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError(namespace, name, kind string) error {
42: 	var gr schema.GroupResource
43: 	switch kind {
44: 	case "CodeInterpreter":
45: 		gr = schema.GroupResource{Group: resourceGroup, Resource: codeInterpreterResourceName}
46: 	default:
47: 		gr = schema.GroupResource{Group: resourceGroup, Resource: agentRuntimeResourceName}
48: 	}
49: 	return &metav1.StatusError{
50: 		ErrStatus: metav1.Status{
51: 			Status:  metav1.StatusFailure,
52: 			Code:    404,
53: 			Reason:  metav1.StatusReasonNotFound,
54: 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("%s %q not found in namespace %q", kind, name, namespace),
55: 			Details: &metav1.StatusDetails{
56: 				Group: gr.Group,
57: 				Kind:  kind,
58: 				Name:  name,
59: 				Group: namespace,
60: 			},
61: 		},
62: 	}
63: }
64: 
65: func NewUpstreamUnavailableError(err error) error {
66: 	return &metav1.StatusError{
67: 		ErrStatus: metav1.Status{
68: 			Status:  metav1.StatusFailure,
69: 			Code:    502,
70: 			Reason:  metav1.StatusReasonServiceUnavailable,
71: 			Message: fmt.Sprintf("upstream unavailable: %v", err),
72: 		},
73: 	}
74: }
75: 
76: func NewInternalError(err error) error {
77: 	return &metav1.StatusError{
78: 		ErrStatus: metav1.Status{
79: 			Status:  metav1.StatusFailure,
80: 			Code:    500,
81: 			Reason:  metav1.StatusReasonInternalError,
82: 			Message: "internal server error",
83: 		},
84: 	}
85: }

15: )
16: 
17: type valkeyStore struct {
18: 	cli                  valkey.Client
19: 	sessionPrefix        string
20: 	expiryIndexKey       string
21: 	lastActivityIndexKey string
22: }
23: 
24: func newValkeyStore() (*valkeyStore, error) {
25: 	valkeyAddr := os.Getenv("VALKEY_ADDR")
26: 	if valkeyAddr == "" {
27: 		return nil, errors.New("VALKEY_ADDR is required")
28: 	}
29: 
30: 	valkeyPassword := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD")
31: 	passwordRequired := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD_REQUIRED")
32: 	if valkeyPassword == "" && !stringsEqualIgnoreCase(passwordRequired, "false") {
33: 		return nil, errors.New("VALKEY_PASSWORD is required")
34: 	}
35: 
36: 	opts := valkey.ClientOption{
37: 		InitAddress: strings.Split(valkeyAddr, ","),
38: 		Password:    valkeyPassword,
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	if v := os.Getenv("VALKEY_DISABLE_CACHE"); stringsEqualIgnoreCase(v, "true") {
42: 		opts.DisableCache = true
43: 	}
44: 	if v := os.Getenv("VALKEY_FORCE_SINGLE"); stringsEqualIgnoreCase(v, "true") {
45: 		opts.ForceSingleClient = true
46: 	}
47: 
48: 	cli, err := valkey.NewClient(opts)
49: 	if err != nil {
50: 		return nil, err
51: 	}
52: 
53: 	return &valkeyStore{
54: 		cli:                  cli,
55: 		sessionPrefix:        "session:",
56: 		expiryIndexKey:       "session:expiry",
57: 		lastActivityIndexKey: "session:last_activity",
58: 	}, nil
59: }
60: 
61: func (s *valkeyStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
62: 	resp := s.cli.Do(ctx, s.cli.B().Ping().Build())
63: 	result, err := resp.ToString()
64: 	if err != nil {
65: 		return err
66: 	}
67: 	if result != "PONG" {
68: 		return fmt.Errorf("unexpected ping response: %s", result)
69: 	}
70: 	return nil
71: }
72: 
73: func (s *valkeyStore) sessionKey(sessionID string) string {
74: 	return s.sessionPrefix + sessionID
75: }
76: 
77: func (s *valkeyStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
78: 	key := s.sessionKey(sessionID)
79: 	resp := s.cli.Do(ctx, s.cli.B().Get().Key(key).Build())
80: 	data, err := resp.AsBytes()
81: 	if err != nil {
82: 		if valkey.IsValkeyNil(err) {
83: 			return nil, ErrNotFound
84: 		}
85: 		return nil, err
86: 	}
87: 	var info types.SandboxInfo
88: 	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &info); err != nil {
89: 		return nil, err
90: 	}
91: 	return &info, nil
92: }
93: 
94: func (s *valkeyStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error {
95: 	if sandboxStore == nil {
96: 		return errors.New("sandbox is nil")
97: 	}
98: 	if sandboxStore.ExpiresAt.IsZero() {
99: 		return errors.New("ExpiresAt is required")
100: 	}
101: 
102: 	key := s.sessionKey(sandboxStore.SessionID)
103: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandboxStore)
104: 	if err != nil {
105: 		return err
106: 	}
107: 
108: 	cmds := []valkey.Completed{
109: 		s.cli.B().Setnx().Key(key).Value(string(data)).Build(),
110: 		s.cli.B().Zadd().Key(s.expiryIndexKey).ScoreMember().ScoreMember(float64(sandboxStore.ExpiresAt.Unix()), sandboxStore.SessionID).Build(),
111: 		s.cli.B().Zadd().Key(s.lastActivityIndexKey).ScoreMember().ScoreMember(float64(time.Now().Unix()), sandboxStore.SessionID).Build(),
112: 	}
113: 
114: 	return s.cli.DoMulti(ctx, cmds...).Error()
115: }
116: 
117: func (s *valkeyStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandboxStore *types.SandboxInfo) error {
118: 	key := s.sessionKey(sandboxStore.SessionID)
119: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandboxStore)
120: 	if err != nil {
121: 		return err
122: 	}
123: 
124: 	resp := s.cli.Do(ctx, s.cli.B().Set().Key(key).Value(string(data)).Xx().Build())
125: 	result, err := resp.ToString()
126: 	if err != nil {
127: 		return err
128: 	}
129: 	if result != "OK" {
130: 		return errors.New("key not exists")
131: 	}
132: 	return nil
133: }
134: 
135: func (s *valkeyStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
136: 	key := s.sessionKey(sessionID)
137: 
138: 	cmds := []valkey.Completed{
139: 		s.cli.B().Del().Key(key).Build(),
140: 		s.cli.B().Zrem().Key(s.expiryIndexKey).Member(sessionID).Build(),
141: 		s.cli.B().Zrem().Key(s.lastActivityIndexKey).Member(sessionID).Build(),
142: 	}
143: 
144: 	return s.cli.DoMulti(ctx, cmds...).Error()
145: }
146: 
147: func (s *valkeyStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
148: 	if limit <= 0 {
149: 		return nil, nil
150: 	}
151: 
152: 	resp := s.cli.Do(ctx, s.cli.B().Zrangebyscore().Key(s.expiryIndexKey).
153: 		Min("-inf").Max(strconv.FormatInt(before.Unix(), 10)).
154: 		Limit(0, limit).Build())
155: 
156: 	sessionIDs, err := resp.AsStrSlice()
157: 	if err != nil {
158: 		return nil, err
159: 	}
160: 
161: 	return s.loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx, sessionIDs)
162: }
163: 
164: func (s *valkeyStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
165: 	if limit <= 0 {
166: 		return nil, nil
167: 	}
168: 
169: 	resp := s.cli.Do(ctx, s.cli.B().Zrangebyscore().Key(s.lastActivityIndexKey).
170: 		Min("-inf").Max(strconv.FormatInt(before.Unix(), 10)).
171: 		Limit(0, limit).Build())
172: 
173: 	sessionIDs, err := resp.AsStrSlice()
174: 	if err != nil {
175: 		return nil, err
176: 	}
177: 
178: 	return s.loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx, sessionIDs)
179: }
180: 
181: func (s *valkeyStore) loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx context.Context, sessionIDs []string) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
182: 	if len(sessionIDs) == 0 {
183: 		return nil, nil
184: 	}
185: 
186: 	keys := make([]string, len(sessionIDs))
187: 	for i, id := range sessionIDs {
188: 		keys[i] = s.sessionKey(id)
189: 	}
190: 
191: 	resp := s.cli.Do(ctx, s.cli.B().Mget().Key(keys...).Build())
192: 	results, err := resp.AsStrSlice()
193: 	if err != nil {
194: 		return nil, err
195: 	}
196: 
197: 	var sandboxes []*types.SandboxInfo
198: 	for i, result := range results {
199: 		if result == "" {
200: 			continue
201: 		}
202: 		var info types.SandboxInfo
203: 		if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(result), &info); err != nil {
204: 			continue
205: 		}
206: 		sandboxes = append(sandboxes, &info)
207: 		_ = i
208: 	}
209: 
210: 	return sandboxes, nil
211: }
212: 
213: func (s *valkeyStore) UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error {
214: 	if sessionID == "" {
215: 		return errors.New("session id is empty")
216: 	}
217: 
218: 	key := s.sessionKey(sessionID)
219: 	resp := s.cli.Do(ctx, s.cli.B().Exists().Key(key).Build())
220: 	exists, err := resp.AsInt64()
221: 	if err != nil {
222: 		return err
223: 	}
224: 	if exists == 0 {
225: 		return ErrNotFound
226: 	}
227: 
228: 	if at.IsZero() {
229: 		at = time.Now()
230: 	}
231: 
232: 	return s.cli.Do(ctx, s.cli.B().Zadd().Key(s.lastActivityIndexKey).
233: 		ScoreMember().ScoreMember(float64(at.Unix()), sessionID).Build()).Error()
234: }
235: 
236: func (s *valkeyStore) Close() error {
237: 	s.cli.Close()
238: 	return nil
239: }
